title: Queue find method - support for "with item"

features.name: queue find method with with clause referencing item
features.description: Code should include a queue find method call with a with clause that references the implicit 'item' variable
features.snippet: logic arr[$]; logic found[$] = arr.find() with (item == 1);

features.name: class method call on item in with clause
features.description: Code should include a with clause on a queue method that calls a class method on the item variable
